special_mechanics.name: Skateboarding
special_mechanics.description: Core mechanic involving trick execution on half-pipes (freestyle ramp, high jump) and downhill racing. Players perform tricks for points in ramp events.

special_mechanics.name: Pool Joust
special_mechanics.description: Hand-to-hand knockout competition mode where skateboarding physics interact with combat mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative): Wikipedia source provides game design and event descriptions but contains no quantitative physics parameters. Movement mechanics are inferred from gameplay description (skateboarding events) but specific velocity, acceleration, gravity, or sub-pixel values are not documented.
